profile.name: Asad Mirza
profile.heroSummary: Software engineer building full-stack systems, analytics workflows, and reliable developer tooling with strong product impact.
profile.heroDescription: Currently a Returning Software Engineer Intern at StackAdapt, building scalable measurement solutions for 3,000+ advertisers. Computer Science student and Teaching Assistant at the University of Toronto with a passion for systems and full-stack development.

about.title: About
summaryParagraphs: I am Asad, a third-year Computer Science student at the University of Toronto specializing in Software Engineering. I recently completed my second Software Engineer internship at StackAdapt on the Measurements team, where I delivered over one-third of the end-to-end development for the first Cross-Channel Attribution product, projected to drive around $100M in advertiser spend this year. Across both terms, I worked primarily with React and TypeScript on the frontend, Ruby on Rails on the backend, and GraphQL.

During my first term at StackAdapt, I led the launch of a full-stack deletion pipeline that removed 95% of repetitive on-call work and built features for political clients that unlocked over $5M in business opportunities. Beyond internships, I have served as a Computer Science Teaching Assistant for more than 600 students, helping them build strong Python and CS fundamentals, and I also worked as a Research Associate in CS education where I co-authored and submitted work to SIGCSE 2025.
I am also an incoming Amazon Software Development Engineer Intern for Summer 2026.
about.currentRoleValue: Returning Software Engineer Intern at StackAdapt
about.educationStatusValue: Computer Science (BSc) at University of Toronto

bullets: Joining Amazon as an incoming Software Development Engineer Intern for Summer 2026.
Delivered over one-third of the end-to-end development of StackAdapt's first CCA product, enabling multi-channel performance measurement and attribution; projected to generate $100M+ in revenue.
Rebuilt CCA's data pipeline and GraphQL schema to deliver normalized attribution metrics while maintaining sub-5-second latency for large queries.
Built reusable React hooks and components for CCA's study management UI, including dynamic forms, tables, and charts with full CRUD workflows, pagination, and React Query synchronization.
Engineered a full-stack component supporting a new Canadian Provincial District metric for Ontario political clients, enabling over $5M in business opportunities through improved campaign insights.
Led the end-to-end design and launch of a full-stack deletion pipeline, cutting 95% of repetitive on-call work and preventing unintended charges for 3,000+ advertisers.
Wrote requirements-driven black-box RSpec and Jest suites for every feature shipped, keeping code above 90% coverage and catching multiple pre-merge regressions.
Developed new search and optimized web scraping features for a real estate analytics platform, leading to a 27% higher client conversion rate.
Optimized real estate data pipeline code by developing a VPN switcher on AWS EC2 that increased throughput by 500% to deliver fresher metrics.

items.role: Teaching Assistant - Intro to Computer Science I
bullets: Selected by Professor Gawde from 200+ applicants to help teach 600+ first-year students Python and CS fundamentals.
Led office hours and assignment support sessions, resulting in multiple student requests for personal office hours.
Developed responsive React components from Figma designs for a service professional marketplace.
Led form and scheduling flows and earned a $1,400 Riipen project award.
Co-authored and submitted "A Systematic Literature Mapping of Early Generative AI Research in CS Education" to SIGCSE 2025.
Conducted comprehensive analysis of LLM applications in computer science pedagogy and presented findings at academic seminars.

projects.featuredDescription: A collection of projects showcasing my skills in full-stack development, system programming, and problem-solving across various technologies.

items.title: Thumbmarks
items.summary: Chrome extension for visual bookmarking with exact scroll restore.
items.description: Engineered a full-stack Chrome extension to solve a personal pain point in web browsing, building a visual bookmarking system on WXT and React with a Supabase backend, and securing user data via Row-Level Security.

items.title: PaperTrail: AI Powered Receipt Dashboard
items.summary: AI receipt dashboard with Gmail ingestion and OCR extraction.
items.description: Built a full-stack fintech platform automating receipt management via Gmail API integration, Gemini 2.5 Flash OCR, and a Supabase backend, organizing expense data into interactive analytics dashboards.

items.title: Multiplayer Online Asynchronous Battleship
items.summary: Concurrent multiplayer C server using epoll and signal handling.
items.description: Built a scalable multiplayer Battleship server in C using epoll for I/O multiplexing and signal handling for concurrent connections.

items.title: Planetze
items.summary: Android emissions dashboard with Firebase-backed CRUD and notifications.
items.description: Android app in Java with CRUD operations, push notifications, and carbon footprint visualization backed by Firebase.

items.title: Quiztime
items.summary: Flashcard learning app with repetition and progress tracking.
items.description: Interactive flashcard application for efficient learning with spaced repetition algorithms and progress tracking.

items.title: Tetris Assembly
items.summary: Classic Tetris implemented in x86 assembly with low-level control.
items.description: Classic Tetris game implemented in x86 Assembly language, showcasing low-level programming skills and game logic.

items.title: Pokemon Battle Simulator
items.summary: Turn-based battle simulator implementing accurate combat logic.
items.description: Turn-based Pokemon battle simulation with accurate battle mechanics, type effectiveness, and move calculations.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.description: A comprehensive toolkit developed through hands-on experience in software engineering, academic coursework, and personal projects.
skills.learningDescription: I am constantly exploring new technologies and frameworks.

education.title: Education
education.description: Comprehensive Computer Science education with focus on software engineering principles, systems programming, and mathematical foundations while gaining practical experience through internships, teaching, and research.

contact.description: I am always interested in discussing new opportunities, collaborations, or just connecting with fellow developers. Feel free to reach out through any of these channels.
